channel.title: Ghar Ka Organic - Best Sellers
channel.description: Authentic Himalayan organic food brand from Uttarakhand offering homemade pickles, natural honey, chutneys, and bilona desi ghee.

item.g:title: Bilona Desi Ghee from Uttarakhand – A2 Cow Milk Ghee
item.g:description: Traditional Bilona Desi Ghee made using the ancient hand-churning method from A2 cow milk in Uttarakhand. Pure, chemical-free, rich in natural nutrients, and full of authentic aroma.

item.g:title: Raw Pahadi Honey from Uttarakhand – Pure Forest Honey
item.g:description: Natural Himalayan Pahadi Honey collected from wild forest bees in Uttarakhand mountains. Raw, unfiltered, unprocessed and free from any additives or refined sugar.
item.g:product_type: Organic Food Products > Honey > Raw Honey

item.g:title: Kumaoni Aam Achar – Traditional Mango Pickle
item.g:description: Traditional Kumaoni mango pickle prepared with pahadi raw mangoes, Himalayan spices and homemade mountain mustard oil. Authentic taste of Uttarakhand.
item.g:product_type: Organic Food Products > Pickles > Mango Pickle

item.g:title: Nimbu Achar – Lemon Pickle
item.g:description: Traditional Kumaoni lemon pickle with fresh lemons, Himalayan spices, and pure mustard oil. Tangy, spicy, and aromatic with authentic mountain flavor.
item.g:product_type: Organic Food Products > Pickles > Lemon Pickle

item.g:title: Bhang Chutney – Traditional Kumaoni Recipe
item.g:description: Authentic Kumaoni Bhang Chutney made with hemp seeds and Himalayan spices. A unique traditional recipe from Uttarakhand with authentic mountain flavors.
item.g:product_type: Organic Food Products > Chutneys > Traditional Chutney
